purpose: production LibTorch Stable ABI dispatcher and two-minor binary gate

artifact.production_registration: STABLE_TORCH_LIBRARY with boxed Stable ABI kernels

python_gpu_suite.scope_note: The environment intentionally contained no vLLM. The skipped tests require vLLM; the two deselected parameter cases compare against a vLLM custom operator. Loom operator, stream, schema, FakeTensor, torch.compile, CUDA Graph, aliasing, and public inference-only gates passed.

contract.framework_path: PyTorch/vLLM -> LibTorch Stable ABI dispatcher -> versioned Rust bridge -> safe borrowed Rust dispatch -> internal CUDA launch ABI -> handwritten CUDA
contract.requires_grad_enforcement: public Python APIs and vLLM admission predicates
contract.source_guard: CI rejects ATen/c10/torch/library.h includes and at:: or c10:: C++ namespace use in the dispatcher

decision.claim: The sole production dispatcher uses the LibTorch Stable ABI, and one exact H20 binary passes its applicable GPU gates on PyTorch 2.10 and 2.11 while retaining the complete vLLM 0.24 and 0.25 suites on the qualified PyTorch 2.11 stack.
not_claimed: compatibility beyond the tested PyTorch 2.10 and 2.11 runtimes
a new operator or model-level performance result
decision.next_gate: automated Python, PyTorch, and CUDA matrix wheels with clean-install smoke tests
